description_long: This is a large, fantasy-inspired sword with a striking and unconventional blade design. The blade is predominantly black, featuring a jagged, asymmetrical edge with a large cutout near the base, giving it a menacing and aggressive appearance. The hilt is ornate, with a gold and bronze color scheme, circular crossguard elements, and a prominent central ring. The handle is wrapped in a dark, possibly leather material, and ends in a faceted pommel with gold accents. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and decorative materials, with a focus on both functionality and visual impact. This sword would stand out as a display piece or a weapon in a fantasy or urban-themed setting.
description: A large, ornate fantasy sword with a jagged black blade, gold crossguard, and a wrapped handle with decorative accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full jagged blade, large cutout, and ornate gold crossguard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical, wrapped handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the blade's cutout and crossguard details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the blade and the handle's wrapping.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, jagged, fantasy-style with large cutout
attribute_handle_design: straight, wrapped in dark material, faceted gold pommel, cylindrical grip
attribute_ornamentation: decorative gold and bronze crossguard, faceted pommel, large blade cutout
